name: Department of Culture and Tourism Abu Dhabi
message: [AI generated] The Department of Culture and Tourism - Abu Dhabi (DCT Abu Dhabi) drives the emirate's cultural agenda while stimulating its economic growth. Its mission revolves around conserving and promoting the heritage and culture of Abu Dhabi. It organizes festivals, develops museums, and manages libraries, while also overseeing the tourism sector, enhancing the emirate's status as a destination of distinction.
